name: Buttermilk Chocolate Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat together the first five ingredients until blended.
2. Add in the melted chocolate and beat until just combined.
3. Gradually add the next four ingredients, stirring until the dry ingredients are just moistened. Do not overmix.
4. Stir in the pecans and cherries.
5. Divide the batter evenly among three greased and lightly floured mini-loaf pans (6x3x2 inches).
6. Place the pans on a cookie sheet and bake in an oven set to 325°F for 45-50 minutes, or until a cake tester inserted into the center comes out clean.
7. Allow the bread to cool for 15 minutes before removing from the pans and transferring to a rack to continue cooling.
8. Drizzle the tops with Creamy Cherry Glaze once cooled. Yields 3 mini-loaves.
